accessReason.notMemberTitle: You are not a member of this entity

accessReason.notSubscribedBody: This action requires a subscription to the appropriate path within the wallet.

accessReason.waitingPeriodBody: A waiting period must pass before you can access this.

accessReason.insufficientRoleBody: This action requires a higher role than you currently have.
accessReason.suspendedBody: Your permissions have been temporarily suspended. Contact the entity administrator.
accessReason.pendingReviewBody: You cannot take this action until your request review is complete.
accessReason.unknownBody: You cannot take this action at this time.
